name: @waveary/web
description: Official web surface for Project Waveary.

scripts.check: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.server.json
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run build:server && node -e "const { readdirSync, statSync } = require('node:fs'); const { join } = require('node:path'); const walk = (dir) => readdirSync(dir).flatMap((entry) => { const full = join(dir, entry); return statSync(full).isDirectory() ? walk(full) : full.endsWith('.test.js') ? [full] : []; }); const files = walk('dist-server'); if (files.length === 0) { throw new Error('No compiled server test files found in dist-server.'); } require('node:child_process').spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--test', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
